title: Beille 6 Inch Jumbo Stainless Steel Magnetic Bag Clip, Kitchen Clips (2 Pack)
description:
Keep pantry items and food bags sealed with this 6" jumbo stainless steel magnetic bag clip. Designed for larger bags and everyday kitchen use, it securely closes chip bags, coffee bags, cereal, frozen foods, baking ingredients, pet food and other pantry staples to help maintain freshness and reduce spills. The oversized design provides a strong hold on thicker bags, while the brushed stainless steel finish offers a clean, modern look. A built-in rear magnet allows the clip to attach to refrigerators and other metal surfaces for convenient storage and quick access.

Keep pantry items and food bags sealed with this 6" jumbo stainless steel magnetic bag clip. Designed for larger bags and everyday kitchen use, it securely closes chip bags, coffee bags, cereal, frozen foods, baking ingredients, pet food and other pantry staples to help maintain freshness and reduce spills. The oversized design provides a strong hold on thicker bags, while the brushed stainless steel finish offers a clean, modern look. A built-in rear magnet allows the clip to attach to refrigerators and other metal surfaces for convenient storage and quick access.
Key Features
  • KITCHEN PANTRY FOOD STORAGE: Six inch stainless steel jumbo magnetic bag clip has been designed for sealing open food bags in the kitchen, pantry, refrigerator, freezer and more, helping to keep everyday snacks and dry goods tightly closed between uses
  • STRONG JAWS FOR LARGER BAGS: These oversized clip helps close larger pantry bags such as chips, coffee, cereal, baking ingredients frozen foods, snack bags, dog kibble bags and more for practical and reliable everyday food storage
  • BUILT IN MAGNETIC BACKING: The magnet on the back allows the clip to attach to refrigerators, freezers, metal pantry shelves, range hoods, file cabinets and other magnetic surfaces for easy accessibility
  • WIDE EASY GRIP HANDLE: The wide handle is designed for comfortable opening and closing, making it easier to grip and secure thicker folded bags, bulk food packages and larger kitchen storage items
  • BRUSHED STAINLESS STEEL: Made with a clean brushed stainless steel finish, this jumbo clip offers a durable, modern design for kitchen organization, pantry storage, office notes, grocery lists, recipes and multipurpose home use
Specifications
MPN: BLE-H39FHW51
UPC: 810131704391
Material: Stainless Steel
Number of Clips: 2
Clip Length: 6"
Keep your kitchen, pantry and food storage areas neat, organized and easy to manage with this six inch stainless steel jumbo magnetic bag clip. Designed for everyday use with larger food bags and pantry staples, this multipurpose clip is ideal for sealing chip bags, coffee bags, cereal bags, snack bags, frozen food bags, baking ingredient bags, pet food bags and bulk pantry items. The strong, non slip clip helps keep open bags securely closed to support freshness and reduce spills, making it a practical food storage essential for busy kitchens.

Made from stainless steel with a clean brushed finish, this jumbo kitchen clip offers a durable, polished look that fits well in modern pantries, cabinets, drawers, refrigerators and countertop organization setups. The wide handle provides an easy grip for opening and closing the clip, even when sealing thicker folded bags or larger packages such as dog kibble, coffee, flour, sugar, rice, chips and other dry goods. At six inches long, the oversized design provides better coverage than smaller clips, helping secure larger bags with a firm hold quickly and easily.

The built in magnet on the back adds extra convenience for kitchen storage and quick access. Attach the clip to your refrigerator, metal pantry shelf, range hood, freezer, or other magnetic surface, so it is always nearby when you need to reseal open food packages. Use it to hold recipes, grocery lists, meal prep notes, coupons, or reminders while also keeping an extra bag clip ready for everyday pantry organization. Practical, sturdy, and easy to use, this stainless steel jumbo magnetic clip is a simple solution for keeping food bags closed, cabinets tidier and pantry staples fresher between uses.
